game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **섀도우 나이트 - 닌자 격투 액션 RPG 게임 (Shadow Knight - Ninja Fighting Action RPG Game)** Players control a Shadow Knight in a 2D side-scrolling action RPG, engaging in hack-and-slash combat against various fantasy creatures. Movement is controlled by a virtual joystick for left/right movement, a dedicated jump button, and 3-4 on-screen skill buttons with cooldowns ranging from 5 to 15 seconds. Combat involves defeating waves of 3-5 enemies per encounter, who drop gold and equipment upon defeat, which can be used to upgrade character stats like attack damage and health points by +5% per level. Progression is mission-based, with completed quests awarding experience, gold, and gems, while character levels unlock new skills from a skill tree and advance the story through new chapters. The game features an idle system where characters passively train and gather resources offline, and loss occurs if the player's health points reach zero during a mission, requiring a retry.
game_info.description: You are a Shadow Knight, a legendary ninja warrior fighting through waves of dark fantasy creatures. Battle through multiple missions, defeating enemies to earn gold and equipment. Upgrade your attack and health stats between missions, unlock powerful skills, and progress through increasingly challenging encounters. Your goal is to complete all missions and defeat the final boss. If your health reaches zero, you must retry the mission.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move left and right
Arrow Up: Jump
Space: Basic attack (melee slash)
Z: Special skill - Shadow Strike (dash attack with cooldown)
Shift: Ultimate skill - Ninja Fury (area damage with longer cooldown)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and combat mechanics. Validates that the player can move, jump, attack enemies, and survive basic encounters.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move towards enemies and perform basic attacks. Use jump to avoid enemy attacks when health is low. Collect gold drops and complete the first mission.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully defeats enemies in the first mission, collects rewards, and progresses without dying. Test passes if mission 1 is completed.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by playing through all missions optimally. Uses all available skills and upgrade mechanics to defeat increasingly difficult enemy waves and the final boss.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Efficiently use all combat abilities including special skills on cooldown. Upgrade stats between missions prioritizing attack power. Use dash skill to close distance and dodge attacks. Deploy ultimate skill when facing multiple enemies.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player completes all missions, defeats the final boss, and achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test validates full progression system and win condition.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests skill cooldown system and special ability usage. Validates that skills cannot be spammed and must recharge properly between uses.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Attempt to use special skills repeatedly to verify cooldown enforcement. Use skills strategically when available to maximize damage output.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Skills activate only when off cooldown. Cooldown timers function correctly and skills become available again after the specified duration.
TEST_3.description: Tests skill cooldown system and special ability usage. Validates that skills cannot be spammed and must recharge properly between uses.
TEST_3.strategy: Attempt to use special skills repeatedly to verify cooldown enforcement. Use skills strategically when available to maximize damage output.
TEST_3.expected: Skills activate only when off cooldown. Cooldown timers function correctly and skills become available again after the specified duration.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests upgrade system between missions. Validates that gold collected can be spent to increase player stats and that upgrades persist across missions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Collect gold from defeated enemies, spend it on upgrades between missions, and verify stat increases are applied in subsequent missions.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player stats increase by the expected percentage after upgrades. Enhanced stats provide tangible combat advantages in later missions.
